title: Jacquemus Le Chiquito Moyen tote bag
description: Jacquemus updates its iconic Le Chiquito bag in a lilac purple hue. Designed in a structured trapeze silhouette, this style is simply adorned with the brand's gold-tone logo lettering to the front.

title: Jacquemus Le Chiquito Noeud bag
description: The Jacquemus Le Chiquito Noeud bag features a white calf leather exterior, a top handle, logo lettering, a flap top, and a magnetic closure. Imported.

title: Jacquemus large Bambino tote bag
description: Black foldover top tote bag with magnetic fastening, single top handle, detachable shoulder strap, and gold-tone logo lettering. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus Le Bambino woven mini tote bag
description: Light pink mini tote bag with a top handle, silver-tone logo plaque, woven design, detachable and adjustable strap, and top flap. Comes with a protective dust bag. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus La Robe Saudade draped mini dress
description: With an all-pink hue, the Saudade dress can be found in Jacquemus' SS22 collection. The draped design and asymmetric hem reflect the brand's innovative approach to fashion. Highlights include a cowl neck, backless spaghetti straps, and an asymmetric hem.

title: Jacquemus Cubisto heeled sandals
description: Red heeled sandals with a slip-on style and pointed toe. Features a branded insole and comes complete with a protective dust bag. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus Le Bambino leather tote bag
description: A stylish beige tote made from calf suede with a gold-tone logo lettering, featuring a single rounded top handle, an adjustable detachable shoulder strap, foldover top with magnetic fastening, a main compartment, and rear card slots. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus Le Grand Bambino tote bag
description: A larger iteration of one of their signature styles, Jacquemus' Le Grand Bambino amplifies the brand's penchant for minimal, structured handbags. Crafted from smooth leather with a flat top handle, the bag features a removable shoulder strap so it can be worn across the body. The instantly recognisa

title: Jacquemus Le Grand Bambino shoulder-bag
description: Brown calf leather shoulder bag with logo plaque, adjustable shoulder strap, single top handle, concealed magnetic fastening, rear patch pocket, and internal logo patch.

title: Jacquemus Le Grand Bambino tote bag
description: A larger iteration of one of their signature styles, Jacquemus' Le Bambino amplifies the brand's penchant for minimal, structured handbags. Crafted from smooth calf leather with a flat top handle, the bag features a removable shoulder strap so it can be worn across the body. The instantly recognisab

title: Jacquemus La Robe slip dress
description: Sleek and minimalistic, this satin slip dress by Jacquemus is imagined in a timeless off-white hue. It's detailed with an alluring side slit and gold-tone logo plaque on the rear strap.

title: Jacquemus La Robe midi dress
description: The Jacquemus La Robe midi dress features a sleeveless design with gathered detailing, crafted from a composition of 97% viscose and 3% elastane.

title: Jacquemus La robe Raphia fringed dress
description: Debuting on Jacquemus' SS23 runway, the La robe Raphia dress is defined by its cut-out waist and open back that's held together by a leather cord. The light beige cotton canvas construction is complete with raffia fringing at the bust and hem. Imported.

title: Jacquemus La Robe Notte slip dress
description: Jacquemus’ midi dress is modelled on classic slip styles. It’s crafted from black stretch satin and adorned with a cut-out strap at the back anchored with a gold-tone logo plaque. Highlights include a lace trim, spaghetti straps, and a side zip fastening, designed in a slip silhouette with a side sl

title: Jacquemus The Drapeado midi dress
description: Black stretch-design midi dress with asymmetric neck, twist detailing, off-shoulder style, single short sleeve, ruched detailing, draped detailing, and straight hem.

title: Jacquemus 100mm Les Bisou mules
description: Highlights include sesame beige color, slip-on style, snakeskin effect, high sculpted heel, and branded footbed. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus 90mm Les Bisou sandals
description: Black calf leather sandals featuring a smooth grain, buckle-fastening ankle strap, high sculpted heel, asymmetric design, slingback strap, single toe strap, round open toe, branded footbed, and leather sole. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus Les Slingback Duelo Plates ballerina shoes
description: Indigo blue cotton denim ballerina shoes with circular patch detail, logo-engraved gold-tone hardware, pointed toe, buckle-fastening slingback strap, leather lining, branded footbed, and flat sole. Made in Italy.

title: Jacquemus Les Slingbacks Duelo leather ballerina shoes
description: Black calf leather ballerina shoes with smooth grain, pointed toe, geometric panelled design, buckle-fastening slingback strap, stacked sole, branded leather insole, and moulded footbed. Made in Italy.
sizes: Available in different sizes as per selection.
